metadata.description: Reviewing project data, notebooks, and manuscripts to summarize findings for the researcher

summary: Reviewed all major project artifacts (manuscripts, notebooks, data files, figures) and produced a comprehensive high-level summary of the When Algorithms Meet Artists project for the researcher, covering: data sources (131 docs/891 chunks public + 1,259 artist probes + 379 style-matched probes), methods pipeline (e5-large-v2 → consensus UMAP → MLP projection → HDBSCAN 22 topics), and three confirmed hypotheses (H1: 95.4% of artist concerns in 4/22 topics; H2: divergence persists after style controls; H3: governance themes 3-7x underrepresented).

annotation.content: Reviewed full manuscript (NHB2026 sections: abstract, introduction, methods, results, discussion), main analysis notebook (246 cells), data files, and figure inventory to produce a high-level project summary for the researcher.
